content.scenarioHint: 你即将休假，需要向经理申请批准工作交接安排，以确保任务顺利过渡并获得正式认可。

options.text: Can you approve my handover plan? I've arranged for Lisa to take over my weekly reports and client follow-ups.
I'm going on vacation next week, so I hope you don't mind if I don't finish my tasks.
Has anyone been assigned to cover my duties while I'm away?
I think my work is fine, no need to worry about it.

content.explanation: 正确答案是选项1，因为它主动提出具体的交接安排并礼貌请求批准，符合职场专业沟通规范。选项2态度消极，暗示推卸责任；选项3是询问他人是否已安排，而非主动申请批准；选项4显得敷衍，缺乏专业性。

options.text: Yes, I've briefed Lisa and shared all documents with her.
I think Lisa knows what to do.
I'll see if I can get it done.
I'm not sure when I'll finish.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用完成时态并具体说明行动（briefed, shared），体现责任担当。干扰项使用模糊表达（think, see if, not sure），缺乏确定性，不符合职场确认场景的严谨要求。
content.speakerText: Can you confirm that the project handover is complete before your vacation?
content.speakerTextCn: 你能在休假前确认项目交接已完成吗？
